name: Soni King Organic
shortDescription: Comprehensive organic fertilizer blend for improved soil health and crop productivity.
description: Soni King Organic is a comprehensive organic fertilizer blend formulated to improve soil health and crop productivity through natural nutrient sources. Enriched with seaweed extract, amino acids, bone powder, and humic substances, it delivers holistic nutrition to your crops while nurturing the soil ecosystem.
features: Enriched with seaweed extract and amino acids
Contains bone powder for phosphorus supply

specifications.Key Ingredients: Seaweed extract, Amino acids, Bone powder, Humic substances

usage: Apply 50–100 kg per acre as basal dose. Mix with soil before sowing or transplanting. Can be used for all seasonal crops.

name: Kishan Shakti PROM
shortDescription: Phosphate Rich Organic Manure for enhanced phosphorus availability and soil productivity.
description: Kishan Shakti PROM is an organic phosphate fertilizer designed to improve phosphorus availability and overall soil productivity. With a rich composition of nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, and organic carbon, it serves as a complete basal nutrition solution for all agricultural crops.
usage: Apply 200–400 kg per acre as basal application before sowing. Mix thoroughly with soil during land preparation.

name: Carbonix Carbon 14%
shortDescription: High-carbon soil conditioner to replenish depleted soils and boost biological activity.
description: Carbonix Carbon is formulated to replenish depleted soils by increasing organic carbon levels and enhancing biological activity. With 14% organic carbon content, it acts as a powerful soil rejuvenator that improves nutrient absorption, water retention, and microbial population.
usage: Apply 2–4 kg per acre mixed with soil or FYM. Repeat every season for best results.

name: Mico Zyme Gold
shortDescription: Microbial growth enhancer for improved plant health and soil biological activity.
description: Mico Zyme Gold is a microbial growth enhancer formulated to improve plant health and soil biological activity. It promotes beneficial microbial colonies in the root zone, enhancing nutrient uptake, plant immunity, and overall crop vigor.
usage: Seed treatment: 10g per kg of seed. Soil application: 1–2 kg per acre. Drip irrigation: 500g per acre in irrigation water.

name: Kishan Zinc 33%
shortDescription: Essential zinc nutrition for healthy crop growth and improved productivity.
description: Kishan Zinc 33% supplies essential zinc nutrition required for healthy crop growth and improved productivity. With 33% zinc content, it effectively corrects zinc deficiency — the most common micronutrient deficiency in Indian soils — improving chlorophyll formation, root growth, and crop quality.
features: Suitable for soil and foliar application
usage: Soil application: 10–25 kg per acre. Foliar spray: 2–3 g per litre of water. Apply during critical growth stages.

name: Zinco Max
shortDescription: Specialized micronutrient formulation for improved nutrient efficiency and crop performance.
description: Zinco Max is a specialized micronutrient formulation developed to improve nutrient efficiency and crop performance. It provides a balanced blend of essential micronutrients that enhance photosynthesis, correct deficiencies, and improve overall yield quality.
usage: Apply 10–25 kg per acre during land preparation or as top dressing. Mix with soil for uniform distribution.

name: Sulphomax 90%
shortDescription: High-purity sulphur fertilizer for healthy crop development and improved productivity.
description: Sulphomax 90% delivers high-purity sulphur to support healthy crop development and improved productivity. Sulphur is a critical secondary nutrient essential for protein synthesis, chlorophyll production, and overall crop quality — especially important for oilseed and pulse crops.
usage: Apply 5–10 kg per acre as soil application during land preparation. Mix well with soil or compost.

name: Black Gold Humic + Seaweed
shortDescription: Dual-action bio stimulant combining humic acid and seaweed extract for superior plant growth.
description: Black Gold combines humic substances and seaweed extract to improve plant growth and soil health. This dual-action bio stimulant enhances root growth, improves stress tolerance, increases chlorophyll content, and promotes beneficial soil microbial activity for healthier, more productive crops.
usage: Foliar spray: 2–3 ml per litre. Drip irrigation: 1 kg per acre. Soil application: 1–2 kg per acre mixed with FYM or compost.

name: NFL Gold NPK 19:19:19
shortDescription: Balanced water-soluble NPK fertilizer for complete crop nutrition through fertigation.
description: NFL Gold NPK 19:19:19 is a perfectly balanced water-soluble fertilizer providing equal parts nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium. Ideal for fertigation and foliar application, it ensures balanced crop nutrition during vegetative and flowering stages.
usage: Foliar spray: 5 g per litre of water. Fertigation: 2–5 kg per acre per application. Apply at 15-day intervals during growth stages.

name: NFL Gold NPK 00:00:50
shortDescription: High-potassium water-soluble fertilizer for fruit quality enhancement and stress tolerance.
description: NFL Gold NPK 00:00:50 is a potassium-rich water-soluble fertilizer specifically designed for the fruiting stage of crops. With 50% potassium content, it significantly improves fruit quality, color, size, and shelf life while enhancing the crop's stress tolerance.
usage: Fertigation: 2–4 kg per acre during fruiting stage. Foliar spray: 5–10 g per litre. Apply during fruit development phase.

name: NFL Gold NPK 00:52:34
shortDescription: Phosphorus-potassium water-soluble fertilizer for flowering and fruit set.
description: NFL Gold NPK 00:52:34 is a phosphorus and potassium rich water-soluble fertilizer specifically designed for the flowering stage. With 52% phosphorus and 34% potassium, it promotes prolific flowering, strong fruit set, and early crop establishment.
features: No nitrogen — avoids excess vegetative growth
usage: Fertigation: 2–3 kg per acre during flowering. Foliar spray: 3–5 g per litre. Apply at flower initiation stage.

name: NFL Gold NPK 12:61:00
shortDescription: High-phosphorus water-soluble fertilizer for early root growth and crop establishment.
description: NFL Gold NPK 12:61:00 is a high-phosphorus water-soluble fertilizer designed for initial growth stages. With 61% phosphorus and 12% nitrogen, it encourages early root development, vigorous flowering, and strong crop establishment from the very beginning.
usage: Fertigation: 2–3 kg per acre at transplanting. Foliar spray: 3–5 g per litre. Apply during first 2–3 weeks after sowing/transplanting.

name: Fertichem Water Soluble Fertilizer
shortDescription: Balanced water-soluble fertilizer for efficient nutrient delivery during critical crop stages.
description: Fertichem is a water-soluble fertilizer designed to deliver essential nutrients efficiently during critical crop stages. It provides balanced nutrition that enhances photosynthesis, improves nutrient efficiency, and supports healthy plant growth throughout the crop cycle.
usage: Foliar spray: 3–5 g per litre. Fertigation: 2–5 kg per acre. Apply at 10–15 day intervals throughout the crop cycle.

name: Organic Micronutrient Mix
shortDescription: Complete organic micronutrient blend for correcting multiple deficiencies in one application.
description: Organic Micronutrient Mix is a comprehensive blend of essential micronutrients formulated using organic-compatible sources. It provides zinc, iron, manganese, copper, and boron in a single application, correcting multiple micronutrient deficiencies and enhancing overall crop health and yield.
features: Contains Zn, Fe, Mn, Cu, and B
usage: Soil application: 5–10 kg per acre. Foliar spray: 2–3 g per litre. Apply during active growth stages for best results.

name: Bio Growth Enhancer
shortDescription: Advanced bio stimulant for accelerated plant growth and enhanced crop resilience.
description: Bio Growth Enhancer is an advanced bio stimulant formulated with plant growth-promoting microorganisms and natural growth regulators. It accelerates vegetative growth, strengthens crop resilience against environmental stress, and improves overall plant vigor from seedling to harvest.
usage: Seed treatment: 5 ml per kg seed. Foliar spray: 2–3 ml per litre. Soil drenching: 1 litre per acre. Apply at 15-day intervals.
